THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUNGER, MURRAY DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUFARREH, SALEM $462.50 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $522.50, (DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT FOR HIS PREVIOUS PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFF, IF RECEIVED AND ACCEPTED BY PLAINTIFF.)
